slices.title: Backend Authentication Patch
slices.jtbd: When a user wants to access or manage their notes, I want to securely verify their identity and establish an authenticated session, so that notes are kept private and securely isolated per account.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given a registration request with a unique username and a password, When the request is sent, Then a new user account is successfully created.
Given valid credentials, When the user requests login, Then the system returns a secure session token.
Given an invalid or expired session token, When attempting to access notes endpoints, Then the server responds with a 401 Unauthorized error.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Decrease unauthorized access attempts succeeding from >0% to 0% by enforcing token validation on all note endpoints

slices.title: Frontend Auth UI Patch
slices.jtbd: When a visitor accesses the Project Notes web interface, I want to present them with login and registration screens, so that they can sign in or create an account to view and manage their personal notes.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given an unauthenticated visitor, When they load the page, Then they see a login/registration form and cannot access the notes dashboard.
Given a logged-in user, When they click 'Logout', Then their session is terminated and they are redirected back to the login screen.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Decrease the time for an unauthenticated user to reach the login screen from >1s to <100ms via client-side routing
